hero_subtitle: SFTY Business preserves detailed evidence of compliance decisions by consolidating fragmented provider outputs into a structured, auditable policy execution workflow for VASPs.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Policy execution lacks clear audit trail
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to preserve consistent evidence of policy enforcement when provider outputs and decisions remain scattered across multiple tools. This fragmentation slows audit readiness and leaves gaps in tracking how rules were applied and reviewed.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates provider outputs, policy rules, reviewer decisions and evidence into one traceable workflow that helps VASPs maintain consistent audit trails and improve compliance decision transparency.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to compliance evidence
workflow_description: SFTY captures and links provider checks through rules, reviews, cases, decisions and evidence to preserve a clear audit trail of policy execution.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into structured workflows, preserving policy execution evidence and decision history for clearer audit trails and consistent compliance reviews.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with controlled policy execution, preserving decision evidence and governance for consistent compliance and bank due diligence in enterprise deployment environments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY preserve evidence of policy execution decisions
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance cases document provider outputs and decisions
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit trails support review of policy inconsistencies
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY connects fragmented compliance workflows for VASPs
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY serves VASP compliance teams by consolidating KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, screening, cases and reports into one operational workflow for consistent, auditable policy execution.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle fragmented provider outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into connected reviews, cases, decision logs and evidence packages, reducing manual handoffs and improving traceability across compliance workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve policy execution evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves policy execution evidence by recording decision logic, reviewer actions, regulatory rule updates and supporting documents within case histories and audit-ready logs.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates seamlessly with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers without replacing them, layering structured workflows and governance on top of current tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows, helping VASPs manage compliance while preserving audit evidence and case records.
final_title: Preserve audit-ready evidence of policy execution
final_description: Review how SFTY consolidates fragmented provider outputs into structured, traceable workflows for compliance decisions and audit evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
